name: menstrual_health_open_starter_schema
description: Starter schema for synthetic menstrual health research infrastructure datasets.
privacy_position: Public examples must be synthetic or aggregate. Do not include direct identifiers, exact cycle dates, precise location, consent records, or raw free text.

fields.name: schema_version
fields.description: Schema version used by the record. Current starter version is 0.1.0.

fields.name: record_id
fields.description: Synthetic or contribution-specific record identifier. Must not be a real participant identifier.

fields.name: region
fields.description: Coarse region label. Avoid precise location.

fields.name: collection_month
fields.description: Coarse collection month, not exact date.

fields.name: reported_symptoms
fields.description: Semicolon-separated controlled symptom labels. Avoid raw free text in public examples.

fields.name: missed_school_or_work
fields.description: Whether menstrual symptoms affected school or work attendance.

fields.name: collection_method
fields.description: How the record was collected or simulated.

fields.name: source_type
fields.description: Public examples should generally use synthetic.
